body:

| Friend --

After the fundraising deadline on June 30th, my team will have some difficult choices to make about the future of this campaign.

[**What you do today will directly affect what we can say yes to in the next quarter.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI5MzkxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyODEyMjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

We’ve set a goal of 50,000 grassroots donations before midnight on Tuesday. That’s not something we pulled out of thin air -- that’s what we think we need to build the best possible campaign we can over the next few months.

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/deadline/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI5MzkxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyODEyMjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

KP

KP Trueblood
Budget Director
Hillary for America

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016
body:
Tomorrow is our first federal fundraising deadline, and I need your immediate help to ensure we are able to post strong numbers. | |

---
---
|
Friend,

As I stated in my announcement, I'm running for president to keep our country safe and carry on the great promise of America. I believe that in the near future, our country is going to face tremendous challenges - both at home and abroad. We are going to need a proven leader who is willing to make tough decisions to overcome those challenges.

It's time to unleash the American spirit and move government out of the way so the private sector can create jobs. It's time to stop burdening our citizens and businesses with so many onerous taxes and regulations. It's time to talk about realistic, conservative solutions to the difficult problems facing our nation.

**But most importantly, it's time for a Commander-in-Chief who is ready and willing on Day One to confront our enemies and keep America safe.**

**In the months ahead, I'm going to work overtime to prove to voters that I have the courage, experience, and worldview to fill that role.[However, I can't do it alone. I need your support today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28638087:27595708530:m:1:877327319:B0E687B604AA04C211AA5BF915866D1D:r)**

**Tomorrow is our first federal fundraising deadline, and I need your immediate help to ensure we are able to post strong numbers.**

If you agree that we need an experienced and proven leader in the White House, then **I hope you will show your support by donating to my campaign right away**.

[**Please follow this link to donate before tomorrow.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28638087:27595708530:m:1:877327319:B0E687B604AA04C211AA5BF915866D1D:r)

Thank you for your support.

Lindsey Graham

P.S. While there are many challenges we face, they are imminently solvable with the right leadership. I am prepared to take on those challenges, as I have done in the United States Senate, but I cannot do so without your support. [**Please follow this link to donate before our urgent End of Quarter Deadline tomorrow.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28638087:27595708530:m:1:877327319:B0E687B604AA04C211AA5BF915866D1D:r)

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

subject: Tomorrow is the deadline

body:
This week's budget decisions.
Before the fundraising deadline on June 30th, we are reviewing all donation records to ensure completion. Here is what we have down for this email address:

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Status:** HFA supporter - thank you! (But looks like you haven't chipped in yet)
[**Suggested contribution:** $1](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI5NDEyMzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&mt=2&rj=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&rt=0)

---
Please note: These records are specific to this exact email address and may not reflect recent or offline donations.
| Friend --

In my job, I get to see the thousands and thousands of people who’ve donated to this campaign -- it’s a pretty amazing bunch. **[Today, I hope you can join that group.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI5NDEyMzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&mt=2&rj=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&rt=0)**

Farmers and factory workers, technicians and teachers, all coming together to say: Yes. We support Hillary. We’re ready to stand with her from the beginning and help her get all the way to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.

[**Tomorrow is the first fundraising deadline of this election --**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI5NDEyMzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**[will you contribute $1 today to add your name as someone who’s supported Hillary from the very beginning?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjI5NDEyMzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&mt=2&rj=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&rt=0)**

These fundraising deadlines aren’t just a formality -- my team is working round-the-clock to prepare a mammoth report that will be submitted to the Federal Election Commission and made public to the American people.

I’m proud of what that report shows: that everyday Americans are coming together to choose Hillary as their champion. They stand for her because they know she stands for them -- that’s nothing short of inspiring.

**This is a great moment****\-- don’t miss out. Contribute $****1****right now before tomorrow’s deadline:**

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/deadline/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjI5NDEyMzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you!

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just reply to this email with feedback -- we read everything, promise! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI5NDEyMzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyODQ5MzgxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. body:

Fellow Conservative:

The look I see in Americans' eyes as I travel the country today is unlike anything I've seen since I first ran for the United States Senate.

As the White House and our U.S. Supreme Court abandons constitutional principles faster than anything we've seen in decades, Americans are becoming ever more worried.

Worried that we're losing something valuable. Worried about what will become of us if we allow this to go on.

Yet, our national media continues to tell us to expect a showdown between two status quo candidates in 2016!

**[Fellow Conservative, with just under 36 hours until the FEC's End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline, I counting on you to take a stand against the Big Government status quo today with a generous contribution of $20.16 or more](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28729182:27607699298:m:1:879035888:8FC6FE09E0F75B85BF0C2A99796ABAC8:r)**.

But I must ask for you to please act IMMEDIATELY.

Time is running out.

The truth is, I believe Americans are right to worry.

Just think of all the bailouts, stimulus packages, tax-and-spend boondoggles like ObamaCare our country has seen over the past several years.

With over $18 TRILLION in national debt, can we really politics as usual?

We can't.

It's that simple.

I believe Americans understand this. And that's why they're flocking to my bold plans for reform, including:

*** Cutting taxes and spending. My 14.5% flat-rate tax plan would drive a stake through the heart of the IRS, return $2 TRILLION to the American people, and create 1.4 million new jobs;

*** Ending the reign of career politicians by passing term limits;

*** Forcing members of Congress to read the bills they vote on -- instead of springing last-minute thousand page bills on the American people that are laden with handouts to those with the best lobbyists;

*** Repealing ALL of ObamaCare. Every last word of this horrendous government takeover of our healthcare;

*** Auditing the Federal Reserve;

*** Protecting the entire Bill of Rights -- including the Second Amendment, our right to religious liberty, the God-given right to life, and our right to privacy from government snooping.

These strong stands are why I'm the ONLY candidate who leads Hillary Clinton in five states President Obama won previously.

Fellow Conservative, I believe America will reach a critical crossroads in 2016.

This is our opportunity not just to say "NO MORE!," but to begin restoring the constitutional principles that made this nation the greatest and freest on Earth.

I know the media do not get it.

They think the status quo is just fine.

With the June 30th FEC fundraising deadline just under 36 hours away, this is your opportunity to tell the political experts and talking heads to take a hike, and show them YOU will select our Republican Party's nominee.

**[Please make your most generous contribution of $20.16 to my campaign IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28729182:27607699298:m:1:879035888:8FC6FE09E0F75B85BF0C2A99796ABAC8:r)**.

Yet, our national media continues to tell us to expect a showdown between two status quo candidates in 2016! . But I must ask for you to please act IMMEDIATELY. Time is running out. The truth is, I believe Americans are right to worry. Just think of all the bailouts, stimulus packages, tax-and-spend boondoggles like ObamaCare our country has seen over the past several years. With over $18 TRILLION in national debt, can we really politics as usual? We can't. It's that simple. I believe Americans understand this. And that's why they're flocking to my bold plans for reform, including: * Cutting taxes and spending. My 14.5% flat-rate tax plan would drive a stake through the heart of the IRS, return $2 TRILLION to the American people, and create 1.4 million new jobs; Ending the reign of career politicians by passing term limits; Forcing members of Congress to read the bills they vote on -- instead of springing last-minute thousand page bills on the American people that are laden with handouts to those with the best lobbyists; Repealing ALL of ObamaCare. Every last word of this horrendous government takeover of our healthcare; Auditing the Federal Reserve; Protecting the entire Bill of Rights -- including the Second Amendment, our right to religious liberty, the God-given right to life, and our right to privacy from government snooping. These strong stands are why I'm the ONLY candidate who leads Hillary Clinton in five states President Obama won previously. Fellow Conservative, I believe America will reach a critical crossroads in 2016. This is our opportunity not just to say "NO MORE!," but to begin restoring the constitutional principles that made this nation the greatest and freest on Earth. I know the media do not get it. They think the status quo is just fine. With the June 30th FEC fundraising deadline just under 36 hours away, this is your opportunity to tell the political experts and talking heads to take a hike, and show them YOU will select our Republican Party's nominee. . | "" Contributed to End of Quarter Money Bomb? body:
#
Friend -
We've long suspected that other candidates are going to raise a lot more money than we will. That's what happens when you have Wall Street and the billionaire class in your corner.

Here's the thing: we shouldn't have to worry. Even though Bernie's not going to have Super PACs, and even though he's not going to have the obscenely wealthy pooling their money for him, we know we have more power.

**That's because Bernie has you.**

Together, we can show the billionaire class that they don't just have to deal with Bernie. They have to deal with all of us.

**Tuesday at midnight is the first major deadline for our campaign.** The next day, we have to start filing reports with the Federal Election Commission about our fundraising. It's a big moment, and we need to get the biggest show of support we can by then.

[**Please contribute $3 now to support Bernie's campaign for president before Tuesday's deadline.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21cd/43f17890/5fbbaabb/621daab1/1600604423/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-has-you?refcode=em150629d")

Jeff Weaver
